name: §6Rock
description:
§8Mining Mount

§7Defense: §a200
§7True Defense: §f[True Defense]

§6Ridable
§7Right-click your summoned pet to
§7ride it!

§6Sailing Stone
§7Sneak to move your rock to your
§7location (15s cooldown)

§6Fortify
§7While sitting on your rock, gain +§a25%
§7defense

§6Steady Ground
§7While sitting on your rock, deal §c+30x
§7damage

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Blinking Rock Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to §aRock
§7pets.

§aThis skin is animated!

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
